selected_plan.title: Deliver the first async interview practice MVP
selected_plan.summary: Build a small browser-based experience for session setup, answer capture, rubric feedback, and saved results.

retained_alternatives.title: Chat-only prototype
retained_alternatives.summary: Use a single conversational surface with minimal structure and looser reports.

nodes.title: Launch the async interview practice MVP
nodes.description: Deliver a browser-based MVP that validates demand for structured async interview practice.
nodes.why: The team needs evidence of user value before investing in live or mobile-first versions.
acceptance_criteria: A user can complete a session
A user receives saved rubric-based feedback
assumptions: Typed answers are enough for the first validation cycle
risks: Feedback quality may be too weak to feel useful

nodes.title: Stabilize the session and feedback model
nodes.description: Define the contract for sessions, answers, and rubric summaries.
nodes.why: Execution depends on a stable representation of session state and saved feedback.
acceptance_criteria: Session and summary models cover MVP needs
assumptions: The domain can stay simple in the MVP
risks: Premature complexity in the data model

nodes.title: Ship a complete user path from setup to review
nodes.description: Provide a browser flow that goes from session setup through answer capture to report review.
nodes.why: The value of the MVP depends on an end-to-end path, not isolated components.
acceptance_criteria: Users can start, complete, and revisit a session
assumptions: A short guided session is enough to test value
risks: Users may drop off before feedback

nodes.title: Define session and feedback domain contracts
nodes.description: Model the interview session, question sequence, saved result, and rubric summary structures.
nodes.why: The rest of the MVP depends on having stable session and feedback shapes.
acceptance_criteria: Session and summary data structures are defined
assumptions: The first iteration can use a minimal but explicit schema
done_criteria: Domain model covers session, answer, and feedback summary

verification.description: Review that the domain contract supports the selected approach.

reentry_triggers: If executor-side todo decomposition cannot produce actionable leaves without changing scope, recommend Uigwe local_reexploration.
If execution invalidates the selected design approach, recommend Uigwe brainstorming.
If success criteria, non-goals, or must-preserve behavior are contradicted, recommend deep_interview or human_review.

nodes.title: Implement the browser session flow
nodes.description: Create the user flow for role selection, question progression, and answer capture.
nodes.why: The MVP needs a complete path from session start to completed answers.
acceptance_criteria: A user can start and complete a short session
assumptions: A browser flow is sufficient for initial testing
risks: Users may drop off before finishing the session
done_criteria: Users can move through the session flow
Answers are captured in the domain model

verification.description: Walk through the session flow in the browser.

reentry_triggers: If executor-side todo decomposition cannot produce actionable leaves without changing scope, recommend Uigwe local_reexploration.
If execution invalidates the selected design approach, recommend Uigwe brainstorming.
If success criteria, non-goals, or must-preserve behavior are contradicted, recommend deep_interview or human_review.

nodes.title: Implement feedback generation and saved session history
nodes.description: Generate a rubric summary for a completed session and make saved reports reviewable later.
nodes.why: Feedback and saved recall are the main proof of value for the MVP.
acceptance_criteria: Completed sessions produce saved feedback summaries
Past session summaries can be revisited
assumptions: Rubric-based summaries can feel useful in the MVP
risks: History may expose weak session structure
done_criteria: Saved summaries exist for completed sessions
A user can revisit a saved report

verification.description: Complete a session and reopen the saved summary.

reentry_triggers: If executor-side todo decomposition cannot produce actionable leaves without changing scope, recommend Uigwe local_reexploration.
If execution invalidates the selected design approach, recommend Uigwe brainstorming.
If success criteria, non-goals, or must-preserve behavior are contradicted, recommend deep_interview or human_review.

risk_summary.description: The rubric evaluator may produce weak feedback without tighter structure.
risk_summary.mitigation: Use explicit rubric templates and sample-session testing.

risk_summary.description: Too much setup may reduce first-session completion.
risk_summary.mitigation: Keep the setup flow short and template-driven.
